name: Newyork Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups fat-free cookie crumbs (Health Valley Cookies or similar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300°F.
2. Moisten your fingers with water and press the cookie crumbs evenly over the bottom and sides of a 9- or 10-inch spring form pan. Chill while preparing the filling.
3. In a large bowl, beat the yogurt cheese until smooth, then gradually add honey, vanilla, arrowroot, and egg whites. Mix until thoroughly blended.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
5. Bake at 300°F for 60-75 minutes, or until the center is set and the surface is lightly browned.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool to room temperature before refrigerating several hours until chilled.
yield: 12 servings
Nutrition information (per serving):
Calories: 214
Fat: 0.3 grams (1% of calories)
Cholesterol: 2.7 milligrams
Sodium: 156 milligrams
Dietary Fiber: 1.3 grams
